string.text:
The M60E4 (Mk 43 Mod 1) is a 7.62x51 caliber light machine gun, a modification of the M60E3 with a more reliable trigger mechanism, ability to attach optics, and a number of other improvements. The M60 was nicknamed "The Pig" due to its bulky size and design flaws. Despite its disadvantages, variants of the M60 are still used in some military units, and it end up in the zone to some lucky kids. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] NATO suppressor

The M60E4 (Mk 43 Mod 1) is a 7.62x51 caliber light machine gun, a modification of the M60E3 with a more reliable trigger mechanism, ability to attach optics, and a number of other improvements. The M60 was nicknamed "The Pig" due to its bulky size and design flaws. Despite its disadvantages, variants of the M60 are still used in some military units, and it end up in the zone to some lucky kids. This model features a B-25U RK-1 Grip and a MAWL-C1 Laser for tactical instances.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] B-25U RK-1 Grip
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] MAWL C1 Laser Aim Module
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] NATO suppressor
A 100-round 7.62x51 hard plastic ammo box for the M60 machine gun.
